apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Create keys, track usage-based billing, and read the full API reference.

keys.heading: Your API keys
keys.description: Keys authenticate the public API. Treat them like passwords — a key is shown once and stored only as a salted hash.
keys.limitReached: You have reached the maximum of 20 active keys. Revoke one to create another.
keys.tokenWarning: This is the only time the full key is shown. Store it securely — it cannot be retrieved again.
keys.none: You have no API keys yet. Create one above to get started.

usage.heading: Usage-based billing
usage.description: The public API is metered per code pair analyzed. Each plan includes a monthly allowance; usage beyond it is billed as overage.
usage.estimateNote: Estimate only. Actual invoicing runs through your billing provider once configured.
usage.noUsage: No API usage yet this period. Once you call the API with a key, usage appears here.

docs.heading: API documentation
docs.intro: Everything you need to call the CodeClone public API from a script, CI pipeline, or service.
